---
title: "‘Realism and Typology in Charlotte M. Yonge’s The Heir of Redclyffe’"
---

## ‘Realism and Typology in Charlotte M. Yonge’s The Heir of Redclyffe’

**Author:** Gavin Budge
**Date:** 2003
**Imprint:** <i>Victorian Literature and Culture </i>31, 193-223

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
